scripts.dev:enchant: bun -e "Bun.serve({ port: 8080, fetch(req) { const url = new URL(req.url); let path = '.' + decodeURIComponent(url.pathname); if (path === './') path = './enchant-prototype.html'; return new Response(Bun.file(path)); } }); console.log('Enchant editor: http://localhost:8080')"
scripts.dev:spell-editor: bun -e "Bun.serve({ port: 8081, fetch(req) { const url = new URL(req.url); let path = '.' + decodeURIComponent(url.pathname); if (path === './') path = './spell-editor.html'; return new Response(Bun.file(path)); } }); console.log('Spell editor: http://localhost:8081')"
scripts.build: bun run build:client && bun run build:editor && bun run build:website
scripts.typecheck: bun run typecheck:app && bun run typecheck:website
